features.name: 4-state 'x literal to 2-state variable assignment
features.description: Code should include assigning a 4-state 'x literal to a 2-state variable (int, bit, byte, etc.) where the 'x should convert to 0

features.name: function implicit return with 4-state value to 2-state
features.description: Code should include a function with no explicit return statement that implicitly returns a 4-state value, assigned to a 2-state variable
